  • Classes in edu.yu.cs.com3810.models used by edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation
    Class
    Description
    AutomationRule
    Represents a user-defined automation rule.
    AutomationRuleMessage
    Payload for messages published to the TopicType.AUTOMATION topic.
    DeviceEvent
    Represents an event emitted by an input-type edge device (e.g., motion sensor, doorbell, light sensor).
    Message
    A generic envelope for all messages transmitted over the Message Bus.

    Description

    A generic envelope for all messages transmitted over the Message Bus.
  • Classes in edu.yu.cs.com3810.models used by edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator
    Class
    Description
    AutomationRule
    Represents a user-defined automation rule.
    AutomationRuleMessage
    Payload for messages published to the TopicType.AUTOMATION topic.
    ClaimDeviceRequest
    Encapsulates a user's request to claim a device, sent from the ApiGateway to the leader coordinator over the direct TCP conn.
    Command
    Represents a command issued to an edge device.
    Device
    Represents a registered smart home edge device owned by a User.
    DeviceEvent
    Represents an event emitted by an input-type edge device (e.g., motion sensor, doorbell, light sensor).
    Message
    A generic envelope for all messages transmitted over the Message Bus.
    RegistrationPayload
    The payload published by an edge device to the TopicType.REGISTER topic on startup.
    User
    Represents a registered Smart Home user.

    Class
    Description
    Command
    Represents a command issued to an edge device.
  • Classes in edu.yu.cs.com3810.models used by edu.yu.cs.com3810.gateway
    Class
    Description
    CoordinatorRequest
    Represents a request sent from the API Gateway or a peer node to a Coordinator node's TCP server.
    CoordinatorResponse
    Represents a response returned by a Coordinator node's TCP server.

    Description

    A generic envelope for all messages transmitted over the Message Bus.

    Class
    Description
    AutomationRule
    Represents a user-defined automation rule.
    AutomationRuleMessage
    Payload for messages published to the TopicType.AUTOMATION topic.
    AutomationRuleMessage.Operation
    The type of automation rule operation carried by this message.
    ClaimDeviceRequest
    Encapsulates a user's request to claim a device, sent from the ApiGateway to the leader coordinator over the direct TCP conn.
    CoordinatorRequest.Type
    The type of request being made to the coordinator.
    CoordinatorResponse
    Represents a response returned by a Coordinator node's TCP server.
    ElectionMessage.Type
    The type of election protocol message.
    ReplicationMessage
    Payload for messages published to the REPLICATION topic.
    ReplicationMessage.Type
     
    User
    Represents a registered Smart Home user.
